CharCoat CTI
PRODUCT DESCRIPTION
CharCoat CTI is an easy to apply argon filled, soda lime-borosilicate
glass sphere beaded coa(cid:415)ng designed to insulate the substrate to
which it is applied. It is a high solids, thin-film insula(cid:415)ng coa(cid:415)ng that
is highly relec(cid:415)ve and can be used internally or externally and is AUTHOR SEAN RITCHIE
non-flammable. The Standard version includes an(cid:415)-corrosion VERSION 5.0
PURPOSE/CHANGES TECHNICAL ADJUSTMENT
addi(cid:415)ves for steel, but is a great coa(cid:415)ng for all substrate types,

including stainless steel!

TYPICAL SERVICE LIFE STORAGE AND HANDLING PRECAUTIONS
Life expectancy for the CTI is > 15years for most applica(cid:415)ons. The product should be kept properly closed and stored indoors in a
